critique: Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_column is meant to retain only the columns relevant to the question (such as the "position" column to identify first-place finishes). Using f_select_column(*) keeps all columns and fails to narrow the table to the pertinent data, misapplying the function’s purpose.
